steps.t: The stable-hand is in the field behind the stable. A guard saw a local stable-hand being followed by a rowdy group of men and has asked you to check o…
The healer is in the shop behind the inn that faces the fountain in the centre of Woodhurst. Broda asked you to seek help for him from the town healer…
Broda, the injured stable-hand, is in the field behind the stable by the eastern gate of Woodhurst. You should bring the healer's pack to Broda at onc…
Broda is in the field behind the stable. You should speak with Broda again, before moving on.
